name: @octavio.bot/review
description: CLI for OpenCode-powered pull request review checks

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.mjs --target bun --banner '#!/usr/bin/env bun' && chmod +x ./dist/index.mjs && rm -rf ./prompts && mkdir -p ./prompts && cp ../../packages/prompts/prompts/*.md ./prompts/
